germanyMap.headline: From Pforzheim across Germany — a reliable logistics network
germanyMap.body1: Coordinate transports between federal states with teams that know routes, time windows, and regional workflows.
germanyMap.body2: Our drivers speak your language — from booking to delivery, clear and approachable.
germanyMap.speedDesc: Book, pay, and get moving in a few steps — fast and straightforward.
germanyMap.mapAria: Map of Germany with animated connection lines between regions

driverCta.headline: Join our network in Pforzheim and the region
driverCta.body: Fair hourly pay, clear processes, and a team that supports you on the road — apply in a few steps.

order.title: Book transport order
order.cargoWhatToTransport: What do you want to transport?
order.driverTimeRequiresAddress: To calculate driver time and hourly billing, enter pickup and delivery addresses in the previous step and click "Calculate real distance".
order.distanceManualHint: Could not calculate automatically — enter distance manually in the next step.
order.success: Payment successful. Your order has been recorded.
order.confirmedSuccess: Order confirmed. We will contact you after assigning a driver to complete payment.
order.thankYouMessage: We appreciate your trust. We will contact you shortly to confirm your request.
order.confirmByEmailHint: We will send you an email with a confirmation link. When you click it, payment and driver details will appear.
order.rateUsOnGoogle: Help others by sharing your experience — rate us on Google
order.driverTba: You will receive driver details and arrival time after assignment.
order.confirmMessage: Please verify your details. We will send you a confirmation by email — please wait for us to contact you.
order.confirmCheckboxLabel: I confirm the accuracy of the information above and agree to the processing of this order.
order.trackSubtitle: Status, ETA, and approximate vehicle position when available.
order.trackMissingParams: Please open the full link from your email (includes order ID and security token).
order.trackNoPosition: No live GPS position yet. A map appears when the driver location is updated.
order.trackDriverPending: Your driver will appear here as soon as one is assigned. You can still follow the planned route on the map.
order.trackMapHint: Gray dashed: planned route (pickup → delivery). Orange: live GPS trail. Large round marker: driver photo at the current position. The orange button opens Google Maps zoomed in on that spot for easier live tracking.
order.trackNoGeocode: We could not load the automatic map for these addresses. Open the route in Google Maps instead.

infoPageClosing.ctaSub: Rooted in Pforzheim — message us or book online in minutes.

driver.servicePolicy: I agree that the recruitment officer may contact me via WhatsApp to follow up on my application.
driver.vehicleSectionHint: Upload vehicle documents and an exterior photo like the sample below.
driver.chooseFileOrDrag: Choose file or drag image here
driver.workPolicyAgree: I agree to the work and company policy above.
driver.successMessage: We will review your file and contact you via WhatsApp or email. Thank you for your trust in TransPool24.

landing.metaDescription: Apply to drive for TransPool24 in Pforzheim and the region. Fair hourly pay and flexible hours.
landing.heroLead: Drive for us – fair hourly pay plus tips.
landing.heroFootnote: * Example: base pay plus job bonuses for full-time shifts.
landing.trackingTeaserBody: On active jobs, drivers can share GPS with dispatch and customers — they see progress and ETA on the booking system.
landing.card1Title: Fair pay: hourly rate plus extras
landing.card1Body: Clear hourly rate, waiting time compensation, and tips.
landing.card2Body: Clear agreements, on-time payments, support when you need it.
landing.card3Body: Full-time or part-time – you choose your hours.
landing.requirementsTitle: What you need to get started
landing.req1Body: Valid ID, driving licence, vehicle insured as required.
landing.req2Body: Work with your own vehicle; mileage is accounted for.
landing.req4Body: Enjoy driving and interacting with customers.
landing.process1: 1. Fill in the form. 2. Prepare documents.
landing.process2: 3. Short interview. 4. If it fits, you receive an offer.
landing.process3: 5. Equipment & schedule. 6. We support you on your first day.
landing.testimonialQuote: “Working with TransPool24 is flexible and clear – especially evenings and weekends.”
landing.faq1q: How old do I need to be to work as a driver?
landing.faq1a: You must be at least 18 and hold a valid driving licence.
landing.faq2a: We work on an hourly basis – depending on distance and loading/unloading time, transparent and traceable.
landing.faq3q: My city is not listed – can I still apply?
landing.faq3a: Yes. Choose “Other” and note your city in the comments – we will get back to you.
landing.faq4q: Do I need my own vehicle?
landing.faq4a: You can work as driver-only, with vehicle, or with vehicle and assistant – depending on the job.
landing.faq5a: After your application we review your details and contact you by email or phone.

driverShare.pageSubtitle: TransPool24 — for assigned drivers only. Your position helps dispatch and the customer ETA.
driverShare.title: GPS sharing
driverShare.intro: Tap the button below and allow location access. We send your position about every 12 seconds while this page stays open.
driverShare.privacyBody: Sharing uses your phone GPS. You can stop anytime. Close the tab or tap Stop sharing.
driverShare.missingParams: This link is incomplete. Ask dispatch for the full link.
driverShare.noGeolocation: This browser does not support location.
driverShare.permissionDenied: Location permission denied. Enable it in browser settings.
driverShare.sendFailed: Could not send position. Check connection.
driverShare.keepOpen: Tip: keep this page open in the foreground during the trip for best updates.
driverShare.navIntro: Opens Google Maps with turn-by-turn directions. Use after you start the trip.
driverShare.routeInfoHint: From the order; traffic may differ.
driverShare.podIntro: After delivery, upload a handover photo. The job is marked delivered automatically and dispatch will see the image.
driverShare.podUploadOk: Proof of delivery saved. Thank you!
driverShare.podNotImage: Please choose an image (JPEG, PNG or WebP).
driverShare.gpsMandatoryShort: Required: Start live location first, then delivery photo. No GPS → no delivery confirmation.
driverShare.gpsMandatoryTitle: Required: Live location for the customer
driverShare.gpsMandatoryBody: Tap the button and allow location access. After at least one successful update, you appear on the customer tracking page and you can upload the delivery photo.
driverShare.gpsOkForCustomer: Location is being sent – customer tracking is active.
driverShare.gpsRequiredBeforePod: Please start location sharing above and wait until a position is sent. Delivery photo is not possible without live GPS.

privacyPolicy.metaDescription: How TransPool24 processes personal data (website, bookings, driver applications) under the GDPR.
privacyPolicy.pageLead: This privacy notice explains, in accordance with Articles 13 and 14 GDPR, how we process personal data when you visit our website, use our online booking for transport services, or apply as a driver.
privacyPolicy.socialIntro: When you visit our social media profiles, platform operators may process personal data (e.g. IP address). Please refer to each provider’s privacy policy:

s1.title: 1. Purpose and scope
s1.p1: TransPool24 provides transport and logistics services focused on Pforzheim and the region. We only process personal data where necessary to operate the website, conclude and perform contracts, comply with legal obligations, or based on your consent.
s1.p2: This notice covers our public website, the booking / order process, communication by email or contact form, and driver applications.
s1.p3: We do not use solely automated decision-making including profiling within the meaning of Art. 22 GDPR.

s2.title: 2. Controller
s2.p1: The controller under GDPR is TransPool24 (see imprint / website for contact). For privacy requests use the email above or our contact form.
s2.p2: Where we use processors (e.g. hosting, payment, email), this is done under Art. 28 GDPR agreements.

s3.title: 3. What data we process?
s3.intro: The table lists typical categories. Depending on your use, some items may not apply.

r1.data: Booking master data: name, company, addresses, phone, email, order details
r1.purpose: Performing the transport, processing the booking, communication

r2.data: Payment data (via Stripe): payment status, limited card metadata — no full card numbers stored by us
r2.legal: Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR; Art. 6(1)(c) for tax/legal retention

r3.data: Driver application data: identity, contact, licence, vehicle, ID documents if provided

r4.data: Technical data: IP address, date/time, browser type, server logs where needed
r4.purpose: Secure operation of the site, limited troubleshooting
r4.legal: Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in secure operation)

s3.outro: If drivers share live location, we process location data only as described in the relevant feature and on the stated legal basis.

s4.title: 4. Legal bases
s4.p1: Contract performance (Art. 6(1)(b)): booking and providing the transport service.
s4.p2: Legitimate interests (Art. 6(1)(f)): IT security, fraud prevention, anonymised statistics where your interests do not override.
s4.p3: Consent (Art. 6(1)(a)): only where we ask explicitly — you may withdraw consent for the future.

s5.title: 5. Retention, sharing and transfers
s5.p1: We keep data only as long as needed for the purposes above or as required by law (e.g. commercial/tax retention).
s5.p2: We share data with third parties only if needed for the contract (e.g. payment provider, hosting), we are legally required, or you have consented.
s5.p3: If data is transferred outside the EEA, we rely where required on adequacy decisions or appropriate safeguards under Art. 44 ff. GDPR.

s6.title: 6. Your rights
s6.intro: Subject to legal requirements, you have in particular:
s6.e: Objection to processing based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (Art. 21 GDPR)
s6.f: Withdraw consent for the future (Art. 7(3) GDPR)
s6.outro: You may lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority (Art. 77 GDPR).

s7.title: 7. Changes
s7.p1: We update this notice when processing or legal requirements change. The current version is on this page with the “Last updated” date.
s7.p2: Please review it when you use new features.
